title: Nmap
description: Network mapper — the most powerful open-source tool for network discovery and security auditing.
fullExplanation: Nmap sends crafted packets and analyzes responses to discover hosts, open ports, running services, OS versions, and vulnerabilities. It uses raw sockets (requires root/admin). The Nmap Scripting Engine (NSE) extends functionality with Lua scripts for vulnerability detection, exploitation, and more.

scanTypes.name: SYN Scan (Stealth)
scanTypes.description: Sends SYN, waits for SYN-ACK (open) or RST (closed). Never completes handshake. Requires root. Most common.

scanTypes.name: TCP Connect Scan
scanTypes.description: Full TCP connect(). No root needed. Logged by target. Slower.

scanTypes.name: UDP Scan
scanTypes.description: Sends UDP packets. ICMP port unreachable = closed. No response = open|filtered. Very slow.

scanTypes.name: NULL Scan
scanTypes.description: No flags set. RST = closed. No response = open|filtered. Evades some firewalls.

scanTypes.name: FIN Scan
scanTypes.description: FIN flag only. Same interpretation as NULL scan.

scanTypes.name: Xmas Scan
scanTypes.description: FIN+PSH+URG flags. Same interpretation. Named for lit-up flags.

scanTypes.name: ACK Scan
scanTypes.description: Maps firewall rules. RST = unfiltered. No response = filtered.

scanTypes.name: Version Detection
scanTypes.description: Probes open ports to determine service/version.

scanTypes.name: OS Detection
scanTypes.description: Analyzes TCP/IP stack behavior to guess OS.

scanTypes.name: Aggressive
scanTypes.description: Enables OS detection, version detection, script scanning, traceroute.

usefulFlags.description: Skip host discovery, treat all hosts as up
Use 10 random decoy IPs to obscure scan

keyFacts: NSE: Nmap Scripting Engine uses Lua language
masscan: faster than Nmap for large-scale scanning
Always get written permission before scanning
Default scan: top 1000 ports with SYN scan
